svg.title: Hybrid eval suite architecture showing the four-tier structure and optimization lifecycle
svg.desc: A diagram showing how gate, core, frontier, and regression tiers feed into GEPA optimization with adversarial cycling between campaigns
svg.text: One campaign, four tiers, continuous evolution

g.text: 3-5 cases. Hard pass/fail. Format, schema, basic tool calling. Any failure = score 0.
10-15 cases. Semantically similar inputs requiring different decisions.
Bulk of score signal. Tests reasoning principles, not pattern matching.
8-12 cases. Evolves between campaigns. Targets current weakest point.
Hard ambiguity, constraint conflicts, multi-step reasoning traps.
Low weight (0.1). Previously-solved cases. Prevents backsliding.
Seed score vs best score delta
1. Run best context against broad challenge set
2. Cluster failures → generate new frontier cases
3. Graduate solved core cases → regression tier

svg.text: if not case.validate(output): return 0.0 # hard gate
for case in core + frontier: # weighted tiers
for case in regression: # low-weight guard
